text: Hyperliquid's $HYPE token remains a strong performer in a challenging market, with significant buybacks and community conviction. Whale activity shows balanced long-short positions, and traders are actively engaging with the token. The community is optimistic about future upgrades and regulatory clarity, especially regarding US trader access, which is expected to drive substantial growth. Despite some skepticism and market volatility, $HYPE is viewed as a core asset within the decentralized perpetuals and broader DeFi ecosystem.
author: elfa_2038301699862081856

text: The Hyperliquid ecosystem is actively developing with new token launches, airdrops, and integrations. HIP-3 and HIP-4 upgrades are underway, improving protocol features and expanding use cases. Builder projects like Based and Virtuals are growing user bases and trading volumes, with Virtuals launching AI agent commerce platforms and trading competitions. The community emphasizes sustainable growth over hype, focusing on real product value and liquidity. There is ongoing development of open data layers and tools to increase transparency and enable traders to compete with institutional players by accessing real-time liquidation and whale position data.
author: elfa_2038343730294313301

text: Hyperliquid continues to dominate the decentralized perpetuals exchange space with record volumes and revenue. In March 2026, monthly volume reached $56.8B, with TradeXYZ capturing about 90% of total volume. The protocol generates significant fees ($68M in 30 days) and uses nearly all revenue for buybacks and burns of the $HYPE token, which has shown strong performance relative to Bitcoin. Grayscale filed for a $HYPE ETF, signaling institutional interest, and the CFTC issued guidance on using digital assets as derivatives collateral, facilitating further institutional participation. Hyperliquid is also expanding its ecosystem with new features like prediction markets (HIP-4), and builder projects like Based are launching tokens simultaneously on Hyperliquid and major CEXes to increase liquidity and user onboarding. The platform is viewed as the "House of All Finance," integrating crypto, equities, commodities, and prediction markets with 24/7 trading and instant settlement.
author: elfa_2038103821172547656

text: Ethereum Economic Zone (EEZ): A Framework for Synchronously Composable Rollups. Built by Gnosis & funded by Ethereum Foundation. > The EEZ is an L1<>L2 framework for rollups that truly compose with Ethereum, not just settle on it. > A smart contract on an EEZ rollup can call a smart contract on mainnet, or on any other EEZ rollup, within a single transaction, receive a response, and use it. text: BNP Paribas, one of Europe's largest banks, is expanding its trading offering to include six crypto-linked ETNs tied to Bitcoin and Ether for retail clients in France. The products allow investors to gain crypto exposure via securities accounts without directly holding BTC or ETH, under the MiFID II regulatory framework. The ETNs will be available from March 30, 2026, with plans to expand access to wealth management clients. — link
author: admin#1534592031

text: Goldman Sachs says crypto prices may be nearing a cycle bottom after months of declines, with the drawdown close to historical averages. Crypto-related stocks are down about 46% from their October 2025 highs, with valuations becoming more attractive. Goldman highlights Robinhood, Figure Technologies, and Coinbase as top picks. However, it warns trading volumes could decline further, potentially weighing on 2026 revenue (-2%) and profits (-4%), with low-volume periods typically lasting around three months. — link
